meaning: n.一局,荒地的周围,发展的机会,好时机,围垦
examples: He struck out in the third inning.
He scored two home runs back to back in the 9th inning.
He got knocked out in the first inning.
Fans also cheered beloved veteran Todd Helton after he legged out a first inning double.
Daniel Nava added a three-run homer in the eighth inning that emptied the crowd.
